grammarNote.title: Street Language: Slang in Action
grammarNote.explanation:
C'est un voleur ! Avril a envie de le choper. Il faut lâcher le chat ! — notice choper (to grab), lâcher (to let go). These are everyday, informal words.

The grammar is the same (avoir envie de = to want to, il faut = one must), but the vocabulary is rougher.

Re-read and find the slang words. Can you guess their meaning from the action in the pictures?
